heading: COLLEGE PREPARATION AND CAREER READINESS ASSESSMENT REIMBURSEMENT
operative_text: A school district is entitled to reimbursement for the amount of fees paid by the district for the administration of an assessment instrument under Section 39.0261(a)(3).
_note: No defined terms in this section. Cross-reference to §39.0261(a)(3) identifies the assessment instrument for which reimbursement is available.
